title: Real donation + refund test by Adam with real card
DNS for seats.bobwillisfund.org + DKIM/SPF/DMARC records via Resend
Stripe live keys cutover + live webhook (after E2E test in test mode)
BWF charity number 1185346 in footer + privacy + terms + receipts
Webhook resilience under load (against Convex httpAction)
description: Per 07 §8. k6 / loadtest hitting the Convex webhook endpoint with duplicate, out-of-order, and malformed events. Confirms idempotency holds and the action returns within Stripe's timeout.

title: prizeDraw.runDraw Convex action — seeded CSPRNG + audit + idempotency
description: Per 07 §10. Internal action gated to admin allowlist. Reads all prizeEntries with eligible=true, picks a winner via seeded CSPRNG (record the seed for audit), inserts prize_draw_results row (or equivalent), idempotent on a 'campaign_draw_id' key so it can only run once per campaign without --force.

title: Prize T&Cs MDX page (placeholder for prize, free postal entry route, free entry equality)
Prize draw opt-in button on Complete step (free, post-donation, separate transaction)
Marketing preferences radio (no default, validation, timestamp on capture)
close_reason: MarketingConsentField + lib/donation/marketingConsent (4+5 tests). Wired to wizard step 3 with validation gate. Next.js 16 file convention rename middleware.ts→proxy.ts piggybacked.

title: Gift Aid step UI — three confirmations + JSONB record + £X→£Y visual upgrade
close_reason: Step 5 UI lands at /donate. Pure logic in lib/donation/giftAid.ts (8 tests); UI in StepGiftAid (5 RTL tests). 49 tests total green. Real amount wiring waits for BWF-f2o.18.

title: donations.markPaid mutation + end-to-end Stripe test card 4242
description: Per 07 §8. Internal mutation: load donation by stripeSessionId, set status=paid + stripePaymentIntentId, find user's active hold for the seat, set seats.status=taken + seats.donationId, delete the hold. Schedule receipt-email action. Tribute remains pending until profanity worker runs (do not auto-approve). E2E test: card 4242 4242 4242 4242 → webhook fires → mutation runs → seat taken + receipt sent.

title: Webhook idempotency replay test — replay same event, no duplicate side effects
Convex httpAction at /stripe/webhook + stripeEvents idempotency
description: Per 07 §8. httpAction in convex/stripe.ts mounted via convex/http.ts at POST /stripe/webhook. Verifies signature with STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET (Convex env). Inserts {eventId, receivedAt} into stripeEvents — second insert throws on the unique index, action returns 200 without further work (idempotency). On checkout.session.completed: runMutation(internal.donations.markPaid). Stripe webhook URL is https://<deployment>.convex.site/stripe/webhook.

title: Hold concurrency Playwright test — two browsers, same seat, only one wins
RLS policies + smoke tests (donor self-read, claim self-update, anon view access)
close_reason: Superseded by Convex pivot. RLS doesn't exist (auth-gating in mutations via getAuthUserId), no SQL views (reactive queries), no /api/seats endpoint (useQuery), no Upstash (Convex rate-limiter component). See design/07-convex-pivot.md and 07b-pivot-audit.md.

title: Migration 0003_enthuse_delta.sql (marketing_consent nullable + timestamp; gift_aid_confirmations JSONB; claims.tag column)
close_reason: SQL migrations written. Apply with Supabase SQL editor or supabase db push once the project lands; deviations from PRD (no auto prize_entries; coalesce on stats) noted in commit messages.

title: Migration 0002_atomic_claim.sql (fn_complete_claim)
close_reason: SQL migrations written. Apply with Supabase SQL editor or supabase db push once the project lands; deviations from PRD (no auto prize_entries; coalesce on stats) noted in commit messages.

title: Migration 0001_init.sql (full schema from PRD §4)
close_reason: SQL migrations written. Apply with Supabase SQL editor or supabase db push once the project lands; deviations from PRD (no auto prize_entries; coalesce on stats) noted in commit messages.

title: Receipt email action scheduled by donations.markPaid
description: Per 07 §8. Convex action that reads the donation, formats the HTML receipt with charity number 1185346 + Gift Aid declaration if applicable + free postal entry footer, sends via Resend. Scheduled by markPaid (not inline) so the webhook stays fast.
acceptance_criteria: Test donation triggers email arrival within 30s; receipt has correct amounts + Gift Aid uplift.

title: Wire donations.createSession into the donor wizard pay step
description: Per 07 §14 step 5-6. Wizard's pay step calls useAction(api.donations.createSession) with collected payload, mounts Stripe Embedded Checkout with the returned clientSecret. Success page reads donations row by sessionId via useQuery(api.donations.getBySession).
acceptance_criteria: Donor completes wizard with Stripe test card 4242, lands on success page showing their seat + tribute.

title: Author convex/schema.ts (full schema with 07b §11 additions)
description: Per 07 §5 + 07b §11 decisions. Includes the additions: giftAidConfirmations, marketingOptIn, marketingConsentRecordedAt, tag on donations. Index by_session, by_user, plus seats by_coord and by_status, holds by_seat / by_user / by_expiry, tributes by_status, stripeEvents by_event. Run npx convex dev to generate types and confirm schema applies.
acceptance_criteria: convex/schema.ts compiles, _generated/api.d.ts includes the tables, deployment in EU.
close_reason: Magic-link round-trip verified end-to-end on localhost. Sender fallback onboarding@resend.dev for dev (real sender swaps in when Adam confirms + DNS lands). Convex EU deployment live; schema pushed; ConvexAuthNextjsProvider wired; /signin works.

title: Geometry yields ~1280 seats vs PRD §7 estimate of ~3500
description: The mock geometry (SEAT_SPACING=9, ROW_SPACING=10, six stands) generates ~1280 seats. PRD §7 estimated ~3500. £20k target at £10 floor needs ≥2000 donors to hit on minimums alone. Options: (a) accept ~1280 and rely on bumps + Gift Aid to hit target, (b) tighten SEAT_SPACING to ~6 to push count to ~1900, (c) add rows to stands, (d) revisit target. Needs Mark + Adam input. Doesn't block other Stage 1 tasks (canvas + seed scale to whatever count buildAllSeats returns).
acceptance_criteria: Decision recorded in design/06; geometry constants updated if applicable; test bounds in lib/geometry.test.ts adjusted to match.

title: Launch day runbook + on-call setup
Convex backup / point-in-time recovery verified
description: Per 07 §13 / Convex docs. Confirm Convex's backup retention covers v1, snapshot or export available before launch.

title: Soft launch dry run with Adam, Ricky, Mark
Final copy pass with Adam — placeholders → real (prize details, sender domain, copy)
k6 load test — 500 concurrent on /stadium, 50 in checkout
Real device QA — iPhone SE, mid-tier Android, iPad
Stage 4: polish, perf, launch
description: Lighthouse budgets, real-device QA, k6 load test (500 concurrent), final copy with Adam, charity number footer, Stripe live cutover, DNS + DKIM/SPF/DMARC, soft launch, runbook, backup, real-card test.

title: Lighthouse mobile budget enforcement: perf > 85, a11y > 95, bp = 100
Cookie consent banner + /privacy + /terms pages
GET /api/admin/exports/donors.csv — Gift Aid eligible donor list
Admin tribute moderation queue + approve/reject actions + visible to admin <5s
Tribute moderation — profanity filter (lib/moderation.ts) + auto_quarantine flow
Stage 3: avatars, prize draw, share cards
description: DiceBear avatar builder + canvas/seat-card render, prize draw post-donation opt-in (free, separate), seeded-RNG draw API, profanity moderation + admin queue, OG images per seat, /seat/[id], /wall, admin dashboard + CSV export, cookie/privacy/terms pages, Plausible.

title: Realtime channel — new claims appear on other browsers <3s
close_reason: Superseded — Convex reactive queries (useQuery) provide realtime updates without a manual channel.

title: Magic-link auth UX (Convex Auth Resend) + /manage skeleton
description: Per 07 §6. Email entry at wizard step 2 triggers Convex Auth signin via Resend provider. Donor clicks magic link, returns to wizard authenticated. /manage page reads the donor's donations + tributes and lets them edit (calls donations.update + tributes.update). Auth-gated by getAuthUserId(ctx).
close_reason: Magic-link round-trip end-to-end confirmed on localhost: /signin → email → click → signed in, lands on home.

title: donations.update + tributes.update mutations for donor edits
description: Per 07 §3 'rewrite data calls' and 07b §11 decision 4. Public mutations gated by getAuthUserId. Donor can edit displayName, hideName, hideAmount, avatarConfig on their own donation; can edit tribute text (which re-flips its status to pending and re-runs the profanity worker). Throws ConvexError('forbidden') if the donation isn't theirs.

title: Address autocomplete (getaddress.io proxy + 24h postcode cache + manual fallback)
donations.createSession Convex action — creates donation+tribute pending, returns Stripe client_secret
description: Per 07 §8 + 07b §11 decisions. Action takes wizard payload (amountPence, giftAid+confirmations, tribute text, displayName, hide flags, avatar config, marketing opt-in, address, tag). Calls a single internal mutation that inserts donations(status=pending) + tributes(status=pending) referencing it. Then creates Stripe Checkout Session with stripeSessionId. Returns { clientSecret, donationId }.

title: Convex holds.claim mutation + UI hold flow
description: Per 07 §7. Mutation: getAuthUserId gate, check seat available, atomically delete any expired hold, insert new hold with expiresAt = now + 10min. Cron in convex/crons.ts deletes expired holds every minute. UI calls useMutation(api.holds.claim) and routes to wizard step 2 on success, or shows 'seat taken' on ConvexError('seat_held').

title: pending_claims table — store wizard payload keyed by holdId (avoid Stripe metadata size limits)
close_reason: Superseded by Convex pivot. No pending_claims table needed (wizard data lives on donations row). No manual realtime channel (Convex reactive queries handle it).

title: Stage 2: payment + claim loop — end-to-end test donation succeeds
description: Holds, Stripe Embedded Checkout, webhook + idempotency, fn_complete_claim end-to-end, Resend receipt, Gift Aid (3 confirmations + JSONB), getaddress.io, marketing radio (no default), magic-link + /manage, realtime, iframe-bridge.

title: Stadium canvas renders empty seats from useQuery(api.seats.list)
description: Per 07 §11. StadiumCanvas client component subscribes to api.seats.list. Renders empty seats from the reactive query — Convex pushes updates without polling. Use the geometry from lib/geometry to compute screen coords; the API returns just (id, stand, row, num, status). Acceptance: page loads, ~1280 seats render, no flash on focus, no manual refetch.
close_reason: StadiumCanvas at /stadium subscribes to api.seats.list, renders ~1280 seats via the geometry layout matched by (stand,row,num). 4 RTL tests cover loading, count, accessibility role.

title: Convex seed action: bulk-insert stadium seats from buildAllSeats
description: Per 07 §14 step 2. Write convex/seed.ts internalAction that reads from lib/geometry.buildAllSeats(STANDS) and bulk-inserts into seats. Idempotent: skip rows that already exist by (stand, row, num) compound key. Run via npx convex run seed:run. Acceptance: ~1280 rows in seats table, second run is a no-op.
close_reason: seedSeats internalMutation + list + count queries shipped. Mark runs npx convex run seats:seedSeats to populate; idempotent on re-run.

title: Geometry port from blue-for-bob-v4.html (STANDS, ROW_SP, vToRad). TDD: pure functions with unit tests.
close_reason: Pure-functional geometry port: vToRad, arcSpan, buildStandSeats, buildAllSeats. STANDS data + types in lib/geometry.ts and lib/stands.ts. 29 tests green. Seat count ~1280 (flagged BWF-fx2).

title: Convex client wiring (ConvexProvider) + .env.example seeded
description: Per 07 §4. Install convex npm package. Create lib/convex.ts exporting ConvexReactClient. Wrap the app tree in ConvexProvider via app/providers.tsx. Wire .env.example with the Convex env block from 07 §12. Acceptance: app boots with NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL set, useQuery hook is callable from a Client Component.
notes: Stashed in-flight WIP. Architecture pivoting to Convex per Mark — Supabase client wiring is being scrapped. Reissue under a new Convex-shaped task once design docs land.
close_reason: Magic-link round-trip verified end-to-end on localhost. Sender fallback onboarding@resend.dev for dev (real sender swaps in when Adam confirms + DNS lands). Convex EU deployment live; schema pushed; ConvexAuthNextjsProvider wired; /signin works.

title: Vitest + Playwright + Prettier + tsconfig strict
close_reason: vitest 4, playwright 1.59, prettier 3.8 wired; first green tests in lib/money + e2e/smoke

title: Next.js 15 scaffold (App Router, TS strict, Tailwind v4, ESLint, no src/, alias @/*)
close_reason: Next.js 16 + React 19 + Tailwind 4 scaffold landed. typecheck/lint/build all pass. Note: PRD said Next 15, current is 16.

title: Stage 1: foundations — empty stadium renders on Vercel preview
description: Scaffold, tooling, CI, Tailwind, Supabase wiring, migrations, RLS, geometry port (TDD), seed (~3500 seats), GET /api/seats, canvas renders empty seats from v_seat_status, donor wizard mock UI (8 screens, no payment), Playwright harness.

title: Vercel project link + first preview deploy
acceptance_criteria: Project linked, env vars from .env.example pasted, preview URL live.

title: Convex project bwf-virtual-seats, EU region, Auth + Resend wired
description: Per 07 §13 step 1-3. Run npm create convex@latest, pick EU region (non-negotiable, donor data + Gift Aid). Run npx @convex-dev/auth to scaffold auth tables. Configure Resend provider in convex/auth.ts (sender = placeholder until Adam confirms). Confirm magic-link round-trips locally. Acceptance: NEXT_PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL set, magic-link login works end-to-end on localhost.
acceptance_criteria: Project ref, anon key, service-role key in .env.local; magic-link auth enabled.
close_reason: Magic-link round-trip verified end-to-end on localhost. Sender fallback onboarding@resend.dev for dev (real sender swaps in when Adam confirms + DNS lands). Convex EU deployment live; schema pushed; ConvexAuthNextjsProvider wired; /signin works.

title: Confirm Stripe test keys + create webhook endpoint
acceptance_criteria: Keys in .env.local, webhook signing secret captured, events checkout.session.completed, payment_intent.payment_failed, charge.refunded subscribed.

title: Stage 0: setup, accounts, infra
description: External account creation and key wiring before code can ship to a deployable environment. Most boxes ticked by Mark; Claude wires .env.example and Vercel project.

title: Counters page — total raised + seats sold via reactive queries
description: Per 07 §14 step 11. Public landing element shows live total raised (sum of donations.amountPence + giftAidUplift where status=paid) and seats sold count. Both as reactive queries, no manual refresh.
acceptance_criteria: Counters update on screen within 2s of a webhook completing in another tab.

title: Canvas redraw < 16ms perf test
LCP < 2.5s on 3G simulation
Plausible analytics integration (no cookies)
Admin dashboard — counters (raised, claimed, entries), recent donations
Wall page /wall — approved tributes, paginated, search/filter
Public seat card page /seat/[id]
OG image route /seat/[id]/og.png — 1200×630, avatar + seat + name + BWF brand
POST /api/admin/prize/postal-entry — admin manually creates postal entries
Avatar full render on seat card
Avatar simplified render in StadiumCanvas (skin + top + cap colors only)
Avatar builder UI with DiceBear lorelei-neutral
BWF blue tinting on avatar (CSS filter or SVG color injection)
Avatar JSON config Zod schema (skin, top, cap, accessories)
iframe-bridge.ts + /virtualseats fallback page
Receipt email sent on succeeded webhook (test)
Resend wiring + transactional email module
Convex rate-limiter on claim, createSession, tributes.submit
description: Per 07 §14 step 12. Use @convex-dev/rate-limiter. Per-user limits (claims < N/min, sessions < N/min, tributes < N/min). Defer to hardening pass; not a launch blocker.

title: Playwright E2E harness + smoke test (load /stadium, see empty seats)
Donor wizard mock UI shell (8 screens per Enthuse pattern, navigation only, no payment)
close_reason: Mock wizard at /donate with 8 screens + 6-step breadcrumb; 5 RTL tests cover navigation, breadcrumb mapping, and end-of-flow disable states.

title: GET /api/seats endpoint (returns manifest + state, revalidate=2)
close_reason: Superseded by Convex pivot. RLS doesn't exist (auth-gating in mutations via getAuthUserId), no SQL views (reactive queries), no /api/seats endpoint (useQuery), no Upstash (Convex rate-limiter component). See design/07-convex-pivot.md and 07b-pivot-audit.md.

title: v_seat_status + v_campaign_stats views applied + read smoke test
close_reason: Superseded by Convex pivot. RLS doesn't exist (auth-gating in mutations via getAuthUserId), no SQL views (reactive queries), no /api/seats endpoint (useQuery), no Upstash (Convex rate-limiter component). See design/07-convex-pivot.md and 07b-pivot-audit.md.

title: Tailwind v4 design tokens (BWF blue #0085CA, brand assets path)
close_reason: BWF palette tokens (bwf-blue, bwf-deep, bwf-mid, bwf-accent, bwf-pale) wired via @theme inline; landing page uses them; body font fixed to Geist.

title: GitHub Actions CI: lint + typecheck + vitest + build on PR
.env.example maintained throughout build
acceptance_criteria: Every new env var added to .env.example same commit.

title: getaddress.io paid tier API key
Upstash Redis via Vercel integration
acceptance_criteria: REST URL + token in Vercel env vars.
close_reason: Superseded by Convex pivot. RLS doesn't exist (auth-gating in mutations via getAuthUserId), no SQL views (reactive queries), no /api/seats endpoint (useQuery), no Upstash (Convex rate-limiter component). See design/07-convex-pivot.md and 07b-pivot-audit.md.

title: Resend account + sender domain (placeholder seats@bobwillisfund.org)
acceptance_criteria: API key in .env.local; domain verification can wait until Adam confirms sender.

title: test issue
description: probe output
close_reason: probe issue from earlier

value: Workflow: feature branch → fast-forward merge to main → git push. No pull requests. Mark works solo, PRs are pure overhead.
